top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.TG > (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN Description LIKE '%TG%' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(Description, INSTR(Description, ':') + 1) AS REAL) END) 
              FROM Patient 
              WHERE Description LIKE '%TG%')
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.TG > (SELECT TG FROM Laboratory WHERE TG IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TG LIMIT 1) -- This subquery is not valid; need a fixed threshold
AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.TG > (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN Description LIKE '%TG%' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(Description, INSTR(Description, ':') + 1) AS REAL) END) 
              FROM Patient 
              WHERE Description LIKE '%TG%')
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.TG > (SELECT TG FROM Laboratory WHERE TG IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TG LIMIT 1) -- This subquery is not valid; need a fixed threshold
AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.TG > 150
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.TG > (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN Description LIKE '%TG%' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(Description, INSTR(Description, ':') + 1) AS REAL) END) 
              FROM Patient 
              WHERE Description LIKE '%TG%')
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 50;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
    FROM Laboratory l
    JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
    WHERE l.TG > (
        SELECT CAST(SUBSTR(p2.Description, INSTR(p2.Description, ':') + 1) AS REAL)
        FROM Patient p2
        WHERE p2.Description LIKE 'TG:%'
        LIMIT 1
    )
    AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 50
) t;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.TG > (SELECT TG FROM Laboratory WHERE TG IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TG LIMIT 1) -- This subquery is not valid; need a fixed threshold
AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) - (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.Birthday)) > 50;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.TG > (SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN Description LIKE '%TG%' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(Description, INSTR(Description, ':') + 1) AS REAL) END) 
              FROM Patient 
              WHERE Description LIKE '%TG%')
  AND (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 50;
